nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Bradornis
nodes.summary: Bradornis（Bradornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Marico flycatcher、African grey flycatcher、Dusky-blue flycatcher。

nodes.name: Dusky-blue flycatcher
nodes.summary: Dusky-blue flycatcher（Bradornis comitatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Dusky-blue flycatcher。

nodes.name: Dusky-blue flycatcher
nodes.summary: The dusky-blue flycatcher (Bradornis comitatus) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It has a wide range of presence across the African tropical rainforest. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
